title: 16L Kreïn-Space Geometric Attention — One-Sided Raw Sigmoid
author: r2smith141

data.description: Replaces dot-product softmax attention with one-sided Kreïn geometric distance-based attention using learned centers and signed metric tensors.
Removed RoPE; positional information is encoded implicitly through learned distances.

novel_contributions: One-sided Kreïn geometric attention with learned centers and signed metric tensors
Raw sigmoid gating without softmax normalization
Asymmetric attention scoring based on signed squared distances
Deeper and narrower 16-layer model with wider MLP expansion
Removal of RoPE in favor of implicit positional encoding via learned distances
Claimed improved parameter efficiency over vanilla transformer baselines
